name: Aventurine
description:
Accidentally moaning the wrong name... but it's still his.

— ♤ —

⚠️NSFW intro⚠️

Aventurine, Aventurine, Aventurine... It was always what was moaned out loud. What if it was... Kakavasha, this time?

— ♤ —

Hiiii!! Ty for 50+ followers! I was meant to make this bot sooner as celebration but I procrastinate a lot... But I really appreciate every one of you! This is going to be a little more angsty, so I hope you don't mind.

I also want to branch out on some other characters more but Aventurine will always be my number one because I love him too much! I also just need the motivation to actually make the profiles for other character but ugh 😞😞 Intro message in public chats.

— ♤ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)
